name: Supertrend CCI Momentum Continuation
edge_hypothesis: Building on the proven Supertrend architecture (two ACCEPTs: PF=1.921 and PF=1.907) with a different confirmation signal. Supertrend direction (SUPERTd_7_3.0 == 1/-1) is a binary trend state — the trend is either bullish or bearish based on ATR-envelope price action. CCI (Commodity Channel Index) measures how far price deviates from its statistical mean, normalized by mean deviation. CCI > 0 means price is above its average — bullish momentum zone. CCI < 0 means bearish momentum. The combination: Supertrend confirms the macro trend state, CCI confirms current momentum is aligned with that trend. This filters out Supertrend signals where direction is set but momentum has stalled or reversed. Unlike ADX (which kills mean-reversion edge), CCI is a momentum measure that works in all regimes — ranging markets oscillate CCI around zero, trending markets push CCI to extremes. Recent outcome: CCI+T3 showed transitional PF=2.32, confirming CCI has alpha. Both conditions are zone-based (continuous) for maximum signal frequency.

variants.name: supert_cci_v1_8to1
variants.description: Core thesis: Supertrend bullish (SUPERTd == 1) + CCI > 0 (positive momentum zone). Supertrend provides binary trend state, CCI confirms momentum alignment. 8:1 R:R. Both zone-based for reliable frequency.

components.notes: Supertrend direction — binary trend state (1=bullish, -1=bearish). ATR-envelope based, proven architecture with 2 existing ACCEPTs.
Commodity Channel Index — statistical mean deviation. CCI > 0 = bullish momentum zone, < 0 = bearish. Works across all regimes.
ATR-based position sizing and R:R framework.

variants.name: supert_cci_v2_strong_8to1
variants.description: Stronger CCI threshold: CCI > 100 (long) / CCI < -100 (short). CCI > 100 means price is one mean-deviation above average — confirmed strong momentum. More selective than zero-line, but still zone-based. Tests whether stronger momentum filtering improves PF vs the zero-line variant.

components.notes: CCI > 100 = strong momentum confirmation. More selective than zero-line.

variants.name: supert_cci_v3_wide_10to1
variants.description: Extended 10:1 R:R with wider 2.0 ATR stop. Supertrend trends can run for extended periods — wider stops avoid noise exits while larger TP captures the full trend move. CCI zero-line confirmation to keep trade frequency up.

components.notes: CCI zero-line momentum zone — aligned with Supertrend direction.
Wider 2.0 ATR stop + 20x TP for full trend continuation capture.

indicator_roles.baseline: SUPERTd_7_3.0 — Supertrend direction. Binary trend state from ATR-envelope price action.
indicator_roles.confirmation: CCI_20_0.015 — Commodity Channel Index. Statistical mean deviation measures momentum zone.
indicator_roles.volume_volatility: ATR_14 — position sizing and R:R framework.
